title: UN chief welcomes US-Iran peace deal as ‘critical step’

snapshot.title: UN chief welcomes US-Iran peace deal as ‘critical step’
snapshot.description: UNITED NATIONS: UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres on Sunday welcomed the US-Iran peace deal with its permanent ceasefire and reopening of the Strait of Hormuz as a “critical step” toward resolving the war in the Middle East. “The Secretary-General hopes that the parties will build on this new momentum and redouble their efforts toward a final resolution of the conflict,”
snapshot.author: Agencies
snapshot.pageTitle: UN chief welcomes US-Iran peace deal as ‘critical step’ | Arab News
